title: Ransom Canyon season 2 is on Netflix now and as beautifully heartwarming as the strongest seasons of Virgin River — but the Western drama pales in comparison to Yellowstone spinoff Dutton Ranch
summary: Ransom Canyon season 2 was never going to be the best Western TV show on the market, but I can't deny how much whimsical fun I had while watching. Ransom Canyon is a love story that sprinkles Western drama in between.
